origin.name: Turkmenistan
origin.key_document: Death certificate from ZAGS (requires certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Turkmenistan travel advice, updated 2025; British Embassy Ashgabat guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not widely available in Turkmenistan. Full body repatriation is the standard approach.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Death certificate from ZAGS (certified English translation required)
special_rules: Turkmenistan is a closed country with significant bureaucratic requirements. Timelines are longer than most countries.
All Turkmen or Russian-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
The Prosecutor's Office orders post-mortem for suspicious or violent deaths.
An export permit from Turkmen authorities is required for all repatriations.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. The British Embassy in Ashgabat can register the death and advise on local funeral directors. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Turkmenistan to UK Repatriation: Guidance for Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Turkmenistan. Repatriation to the UK takes 3-6 weeks. ZAGS registration, translation, and export permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
